title: Qualification Requirement
description: Schema for a qualification requirement — required qualifications for manufacturers, installers, testing agencies, or inspectors as specified in Division 07 sections.

qualification_id.description: Unique identifier for this qualification requirement.

title.description: Concise description of the qualification requirement.

qualification_type.description: Type of party that must be qualified.

minimum_experience.description: Minimum experience requirement (e.g., '5 years of similar work').
